center.name: 富爾奈斯火山
center.summary: 富爾奈斯火山是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括留尼汪石䳭，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found across the island in forests, shrublands and artificial environments such as gardens and plantations. This small passerine bird is common in clearings and open mountain bushlands there up to 2600 metres above sea level, including in the plains around Piton de la Fournaise
